snippet.title: Mike's House S2 EP1 | Live, Love, House Mix ft. S.T.A.N., SMLS, and Fragile Fruit
snippet.description:
Streamed on August 23, 2025

We're baaaaaaaack. Let's just call all of the previous episodes of Mike's House "Season 1" and this is the first episode of Season 2. So let's get into it!

We've got three new guests on the show!

S.T.A.N. turns in a sweet EDM-inspired mix with a good mix of killer drops, edits, and a little progressive house detour.

SMLS is a new mainstay on the show and he curates truly immaculate Tech House sets.

Fragile Fruit is the third set and it's a doooooozy. She mixes a little bit of everything and she brings her own unique blend of house, bounce, and futuristic, danceable songs.

Annnnnddddd....lastly this is one of my favorite sets I've ever done and I know you're going to enjoy it too.

It's good to be back!

00:00:00 Intro
00:00:13 S.T.A.N.
00:55:57 SMLS
01:57:33 Fragile Fruit
02:59:44 Mikezilla

Follow on twitch https://twitch.tv/thankyoumikezilla

S.T.A.N. - https://www.instagram.com/simontakesanap/
SMLS - https://www.instagram.com/smileb4cody/
Fragile Fruit - @Fragile_fruit 

Join the discord https://discord.gg/E5GP7Ejqf2

Like, comment, and subscribe!

snippet.title: Classic groovy house mix - Block Party Pop Up (part 3)
snippet.description:
Streamed on July 28, 2024

0:00 - Avey
41:07 - The Average Joe (All Vinyl)
1:44:49 - Mikezilla
2:19:14 - Techno Tupac

Block Party Pop Up was an all day festival held at Native Son LA and presented by Mike's House that featured 12 DJs from the LA area. This is part 3 featuring Avey, The Average Joe (TAJ), Mikezilla, and Techno Tupac. TAJ is bringing the first all vinyl set to the show!

This is an extended mix with some literal deep cuts, sneaky house bangers, and the nicest crowd you could ask for.

Avey - https://instagram.com/julia.wavey_
The Average Joe - https://instagram.com/dj_theaveragejoe
Techno Tupac - https://instagram.com/techno_tupac

Follow on twitch https://twitch.tv/thankyoumikezilla

Join the discord https://discord.gg/E5GP7Ejqf2

This is a special show to celebrate hitting 100 followers on twitch. This is the second part of a 12 hour stream. This mix features two b2b sets from the FriendsNStrangers crew as well as the hardgroove homies Lonzo, Error, Muxus, and La Grand. And there's a massive b2b on the second half of the video. To top that all of you get to see the sun come up at the end of the video.

snippet.title: Mike's House 21 ft. manamoves | House, R&B, Afrobeat, Disco
snippet.description:
Streamed on January 13, 2024 from Los Angeles

manamoves brought some of that Heat Check energy to this one and kept us all groovin hard to r&b and afrobeat inspired beats. This party definitely ended up on the larger side, too. Thank you so much to Mana for coming through. We can’t wait to have him back. And thank you to all of you for tuning in to the steams, re-watching the videos, and the folks that come jam with us in person.
